title: Sunday Silken Tofu Tagine
description: A North African-inspired stew made with tender tofu, aromatic spices, and sweet silken tofu. This comforting dish is perfect for a cozy Sunday meal.

ingredients.name: algerian spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the cubed tofu and cook until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced tomatoes, Algerian spice blend, and salt to taste.
Stir well to combine and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let cook, uncovered, for 15-20 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
Serve with crusty bread or over couscous, if desired.
